originalTitle: Jeff Bezos’ AI startup aims to build an ‘artificial general engineer’
summary: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos says his new AI startup will work toward developing an "artificial general engineer," according to reports from The New York Times and CNBC. The startup, called Prometheus, aims to develop AI-powered engineering tools to aid in the design of physical products. The NYT first reported on Prometheus last November, but now […]
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos says his new AI startup will work toward developing an “artificial general engineer,” according to reports from The New York Times and CNBC. The startup, called Prometheus, aims to develop AI-powered engineering tools to aid in the design of physical products. The NYT first reported on Prometheus last November, but now Bezos is sharing more information about the startup after a $12 billion funding round, putting the company at a $41 billion valuation. Bezos serves as co-CEO of Prometheus alongside Vik Bajaj, who co-founded Alphabet’s health-focused research group, Verily. The startup currently has around 150 employees. The tools Prometheus intends to build could help develop physical products across several industries, including robotics, drug design, and manufacturing, the NYT reports. “Blue Origin is a perfect example of a company that could benefit from the tools that Prometheus is building,” Bezos tells the NYT. “Any company that is building sophisticated devices — like rocket engines — would benefit greatly from this kind of technology.”
chineseTitle: 杰夫·贝佐斯的 AI 初创公司旨在打造“AI 通用工程师”
chineseSummary: 据《纽约时报》和 CNBC 报道，亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝佐斯表示，他的新人工智能初创公司将致力于培养“人工智能通用工程师”。这家名为 Prometheus 的初创公司旨在开发人工智能驱动的工程工具，以帮助物理产品的设计。 《纽约时报》去年 11 月首次报道了普罗米修斯，但现在 [...]
chineseContent: 据《纽约时报》和 CNBC 报道，亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝佐斯表示，他的新人工智能初创公司将致力于培养“人工智能通用工程师”。这家名为 Prometheus 的初创公司旨在开发人工智能驱动的工程工具，以帮助物理产品的设计。 《纽约时报》去年 11 月首次报道了 Prometheus，但现在贝佐斯在一轮 120 亿美元的融资后分享了有关这家初创公司的更多信息，使该公司估值达到 410 亿美元。贝佐斯与 Vik Bajaj 一起担任 Prometheus 的联合首席执行官，Vik Bajaj 是 Alphabet 健康研究小组 Verily 的联合创始人。该初创公司目前拥有约 150 名员工。据《纽约时报》报道，普罗米修斯打算构建的工具可以帮助开发多个行业的实体产品，包括机器人、药物设计和制造。贝佐斯告诉《纽约时报》：“蓝色起源是一个完美的例子，它可以从普罗米修斯正在构建的工具中受益。” “任何制造复杂设备（例如火箭发动机）的公司都将从这种技术中受益匪浅。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
